title: WORR RmlUi Route Ownership Metadata
description: Supplemental route metadata contract for mapping RmlUi route IDs to legacy/current menu surfaces, source ownership, migration phase, task IDs, and controller scope.

phase_values.starter: The source RML document and static route metadata exist, but runtime opening, live controllers, and parity evidence are still pending.
phase_values.controller_stub: The route has an explicit controller/data-model stub ready for bridge work, but it has not been validated against the live RmlUi runtime.
phase_values.runtime_stub: The route can be opened by the RmlUi runtime path for smoke validation, but functional parity is not yet proven.
phase_values.parity_pending: The route opens through RmlUi and has live bridge coverage, but legacy/current parity evidence is still incomplete.
phase_values.parity_ready: The route has accepted parity evidence and is ready for cutover consideration.

field_notes.legacy_surface: Human-readable source menu/surface name from the current JSON, code-driven, or legacy menu path. Runtime-only routes may use 'none'.
field_notes.current_surface: Human-readable RmlUi route surface name without changing the canonical route id or document path.
field_notes.source_owner: Lowercase token naming the current owner/provider of the source behavior.
field_notes.migration_phase: One of the shared phase_values keys.
field_notes.task_ids: Project task IDs that explain why this route is tracked.
field_notes.controller_scope: Lowercase token naming the intended controller/data bridge scope.
